distinction: 太 has an extra dot below — means 'too/very' while 大 means 'big'
人 left stroke is longer (person); 入 right stroke is longer (enter)
子 has a horizontal stroke at bottom; 了 does not
卖 has 十 on top — the seller gives more; 买 is simpler — the buyer just pays
己 (self) is open on the right; 已 (already) is half-closed
千 has a slanting left stroke (thousand); 干 has a straight vertical stroke (dry/do)
土 (earth) has a longer bottom stroke; 士 (scholar) has a longer top stroke
末 (end) has a longer top stroke; 未 (not yet) has a longer bottom stroke
天 (sky) top stroke doesn't extend past; 夫 (husband) top stroke extends on both sides
日 (sun) is narrower with one horizontal inside; 目 (eye) is taller with two horizontals inside
休 has 木 (wood = rest against tree); 体 has 本 (body/form)
请 has 讠 (speech) = please/invite; 情 has 忄 (heart) = emotion/feeling
请 has 讠 (speech) = please; 清 has 氵 (water) = clear/clean
晴 has 日 (sun) = sunny; 清 has 氵 (water) = clear
他 has 亻 (person) = he; 她 has 女 (woman) = she — same pronunciation
做 (zuò) = to do/make (concrete); 作 (zuò) = to work/compose (abstract)
那 (nà) = that; 哪 (nǎ) has 口 added = which? Tone 4 vs tone 3
午 (noon) vertical doesn't go above top stroke; 牛 (cow) vertical extends above
问 has 口 (mouth) inside door = ask; 间 has 日 (sun) inside door = between/room
话 has 讠 (speech) = speech/words; 活 has 氵 (water) = to live/alive
远 has 元 inside (far); 近 has 斤 inside (near) — both on 辶 (walk)
以 (yǐ) has a person-like left part = by/with; 已 (yǐ) is a single enclosed form = already
贝 (shell/money) has a closed top; 见 (see) has an open top
很 has 彳 (step) = very; 跟 has 足 (foot) = follow/with — both have 艮
对 = correct/toward; 队 = team/line — same duì but different tones and meanings
机 has 木 (wood) = machine; 几 stands alone = how many/table
住 has 亻 (person) + 主 = live/reside; 往 has 彳 (walk) + 主 = toward/go
快 has 忄 (heart) = fast/happy; 块 has 土 (earth) = piece/lump
完 has 宀 (roof) = finish/complete; 玩 has 王 (jade) = play/toy
白 (white) has no stroke on top; 百 (hundred) has 一 on top
想 has 心 (heart) below = think/want; 相 stands alone = mutual/appearance
城 has 土 (earth) = city; 成 stands alone = become/succeed
座 has 广 (shelter) = seat/measure word; 坐 = to sit (verb)
长 = long/grow; 常 = often/ordinary — cháng vs cháng
知 has 矢 (arrow) + 口 = know; 只 = only/measure word for animals
方 = direction/square; 房 has 户 (door) = room/house
刀 (knife) curves right; 力 (power) has a horizontal stroke inside
目 (eye) is a simple rectangle; 自 (self) has a stroke on top
九 (nine) has a slanting stroke; 几 (how many) has a hook at bottom
王 (king) has three even strokes; 玉 (jade) adds a dot at bottom right
睛 has 目 (eye) = eyeball; 晴 has 日 (sun) = sunny/clear sky
跑 has 足 (foot) = run; 炮 has 火 (fire) = cannon/firecracker
鸡 has 鸟 (bird) = chicken; 机 has 木 (wood) = machine — both jī
比 (compare) faces right; 北 (north) faces away from each other
拿 has 合 + 手 = take/hold; 拳 has 卷 + 手 = fist
到 has 刂 (knife) = arrive; 道 has 辶 (walk) = road/way
带 = bring/belt/zone; 代 = generation/era/substitute
办 (handle) has 力 in center with dots; 半 (half) has a vertical through middle
工 (work) top stroke is shorter; 土 (earth) bottom stroke is longer
身 (body) is taller with a hook; 自 (self) is shorter and boxier
待 has 彳 (walk) = wait/treat; 特 has 牜 (cow) = special/particular
注 has 氵 (water) = pour/note; 住 has 亻 (person) = live/reside
试 has 讠 (speech) = try/test; 式 stands alone = style/pattern
该 has 讠 (speech) = should/ought to; 孩 has 子 (child) = child
Both have 犭 (animal); 猪 has 者 = pig; 猫 has 苗 = cat
被 has 衤 (clothes) = quilt/passive marker; 披 has 扌 (hand) = drape/put on
经 has 纟 (silk) = pass through/classic; 轻 has 车 (vehicle) = light weight
钱 has 钅 (metal) = money; 线 has 纟 (silk) = line/thread
打 has 扌 (hand) = hit/play; 丁 stands alone = nail/4th heavenly stem
吗 has 口 (mouth) = question particle; 妈 has 女 (woman) = mother
再 = again (action repeated); 在 = at/in (location/existence)
最 has 日 (sun) + 取 = most; 醉 has 酉 (wine) = drunk
像 has 亻 (person) = resemble/image; 象 = elephant/shape
期 has 其 + 月 = period/date; 朝 has different structure = dynasty/toward
渴 has 氵 (water) = thirsty; 喝 has 口 (mouth) = drink
感 has 心 (heart) = feel/emotion; 敢 has no heart = dare
提 has 扌 (hand) = lift/raise; 题 has 页 (page) = topic/title
级 has 纟 (silk) = level/grade; 极 has 木 (wood) = extreme/pole
练 has 纟 (silk) = practice; 炼 has 火 (fire) = refine/smelt
汽 has 氵 (water) = steam/vapor; 气 stands alone = air/gas/anger
份 has 亻 (person) = portion/copy; 分 stands alone = divide/minute
园 has 元 inside 囗 = garden; 圆 has 员 inside 囗 = round/circle
影 has 彡 (bristle) = shadow/movie; 景 has 日 (sun) = scenery
辛 (bitter/hard) has a simpler top; 幸 (lucky) has 土 on top
抱 has 扌 (hand) = hug/hold; 报 = report/newspaper
密 has 山 (mountain) = secret/dense; 蜜 has 虫 (insect) = honey
吵 has 口 (mouth) = argue/noisy; 炒 has 火 (fire) = stir-fry
难 has 又 (again) = difficult; 推 has 扌 (hand) = push — both share 隹
准 has 冫 (ice) = allow/accurate; 谁 has 讠 (speech) = who — both share 隹
拉 has 扌 (hand) = pull; 垃 has 土 (earth) = garbage (in 垃圾)
记 has 讠 (speech) = record/remember; 纪 has 纟 (silk) = era/discipline
湖 has 氵 (water) = lake; 糊 has 米 (rice) = paste/confused
愿 has 心 (heart) = wish/willing; 原 = original/plain
辩 has 讠 (speech) in center = debate; 辨 has a vertical stroke in center = distinguish; 辫 has 纟 (silk) in center = braid
反映 = to reflect/report (a situation); 反应 = to react/a reaction (to a stimulus)
保障 = to safeguard (systemic/institutional protection); 保证 = to guarantee/promise (personal assurance)
忽然 = suddenly (narrative, adverb only); 突然 = sudden/suddenly (can be adjective or adverb, stronger impact)
立即 = immediately (more formal/written); 立刻 = at once (slightly more colloquial, interchangeable in most contexts)
制定 = to formulate/establish (final, authoritative — laws, policies); 制订 = to draft/draw up (process-oriented, plans still in progress)
以至 = up to/so much that (neutral extension); 以致 = so that/resulting in (negative consequence)
必须 = must (adverb, emphasizes obligation); 必需 = essential/necessary (adjective, describes necessity of an item)
连接 = to connect (physical joining); 联接 = to link (abstract or organizational bonding — less common)
启示 = enlightenment/inspiration (abstract lesson); 启事 = notice/announcement (posted public notice)
截止 = to end/expire (intransitive — the deadline has passed); 截至 = up to/as of (transitive — up to a certain date)
权利 = right/entitlement (legal/personal right); 权力 = power/authority (political or institutional power)
品味 = to savor/taste (verb); 品位 = taste/level of refinement (noun, aesthetic quality)
委屈 = to feel wronged/aggrieved (emotional state); 委曲 = winding/tortuous (literary, describing curves or compromise — 委曲求全)
抱负 = ambition/aspiration (positive); 报复 = revenge/retaliation (negative)
淡薄 = faint/thin/weak (memory fading, feelings cooling); 淡泊 = indifferent to fame and fortune (noble, philosophical detachment)
考查 = to test/examine (check mastery, e.g. an exam); 考察 = to inspect/investigate (field study, on-site observation)
沟通 = to communicate (neutral/positive); 勾通 = to collude/conspire (negative, secretive)
侦查 = to investigate (legal, criminal investigation by prosecutors); 侦察 = to reconnoiter (military scouting)
度过 = to spend/pass (time — 度过假期); 渡过 = to cross over (water or difficulty — 渡过难关)
终身 = lifelong (personal matters — 终身大事 marriage); 终生 = throughout one's life (achievements, career — 终生奉献)
施行 = to enforce/put into effect (formal, laws coming into force); 实行 = to implement/practice (broader, carrying out a policy or plan)
审定 = to examine and approve (final authoritative decision); 审订 = to review and revise (editorial, correction of text)
法制 = legal system (the body of laws as an institution); 法治 = rule of law (governance principle that law is supreme)
树立 = to establish/set up (abstract — 树立榜样 set an example); 竖立 = to erect/stand upright (physical — 竖立一根柱子 erect a pillar)
遏止 = to stop/halt completely (make something cease); 遏制 = to contain/curb (restrain but not necessarily stop)
简洁 = concise/succinct (writing style, minimal and clean); 简捷 = simple and quick (method, efficient shortcut)
启用 = to put into service (a new facility, system, or seal); 起用 = to reinstate/promote (a person — often from retirement or lower position)
包含 = to contain/include (factual); 包涵 = to be tolerant of/excuse (polite request for forgiveness)
化妆 = to apply makeup (cosmetic beautification); 化装 = to disguise oneself (theatrical costume or covert identity change)
申明 = to state/declare (explain one's position, clarify); 声明 = a statement/declaration (formal public announcement, often written)
国是 = national policy/affairs of state (literary/formal — 共商国是); 国事 = state affairs (general government business — 国事访问 state visit)
本义 = original meaning (of a word, etymological sense); 本意 = original intention (what someone truly meant)
径直 = straight/directly (without detour — physically or procedurally); 径自 = on one's own/without permission (acting unilaterally, slightly presumptuous)
处世 = to conduct oneself in society (life philosophy — 为人处世); 处事 = to handle affairs (practical problem-solving approach)
Not a pair — note: 临 = to copy facing the original (calligraphy with model visible); 摹 = to trace (paper placed over original). Together 临摹 combines both senses
退化 = to degenerate/atrophy (biological or functional decline); 蜕化 = to degenerate morally (originally: molt/shed skin — now figurative moral decay)
营利 = to seek profit (the act/intent of profit-making — 非营利 nonprofit); 盈利 = to earn profit (the result — the company turned a profit)
置疑 = to doubt (literary, mostly in 不容置疑 beyond doubt); 质疑 = to question/challenge (active interrogation, raising doubts publicly)
坐落 = to be situated (correct standard form — 坐落于市中心); 座落 is a common error — 座 is a measure word, not used here
不齿 = to despise/hold in contempt (refuse to associate — 为人所不齿); 不耻 = not ashamed of (no shame in — 不耻下问 not ashamed to ask those below)
授权 = to authorize/grant power (the giving of authority); 受权 = to be authorized (the receiving of authority — 受权发布)
作客 = to sojourn/live away from home (literary — 作客他乡); 做客 = to be a guest/visit someone's home (social call)
株连 = to implicate by association (legal/historical — guilt by association, punishing relatives); 牵连 = to implicate (general involvement in a matter)
掣肘 = to hinder/impede (correct form — literally pulling someone's elbow); 制肘 is a common misspelling — 制 (control) is wrong, should be 掣 (pull)
缜密 = meticulous (of thought/logic — rigorous reasoning); 周密 = thorough (of plans/arrangements — comprehensive coverage)
泄露 = to leak/divulge (secrets, information — intentional or careless disclosure); 泄漏 = to leak (physical — gas, liquid leaking from a container)
自诩 = to boast/brag about oneself (pejorative — empty boasting); 自许 = to regard oneself as (can be neutral/positive — aspiration or self-expectation)
鼎力 = great assistance (honorific, ONLY for others' help — 鼎力相助 thank you for your great help); 大力 = vigorously/energetically (general, can be self or others)
磋商 = to consult/confer (more formal, between parties of equal standing, diplomatic); 协商 = to negotiate/discuss (broader, can imply seeking compromise or consensus)
溢美 = excessive praise/flattery (pejorative — 溢美之词 over-the-top compliments); 赞美 = to praise/admire (neutral/positive genuine admiration)
